_comment: Only two channels are supported: 'stable' (ROCm 7.12.0) and 'preview' (ROCm 7.9.0rc1). Both pull prebuilt TheRock distribution tarballs directly from AMD's official repo at https://repo.amd.com/rocm/tarball/. Any other version or source must be rejected by the install step. This matches the pattern used by lemonade-sdk/whisper.cpp-rocm.
_history: Prior to 2026-04-23 'preview' was pinned to 7.2.1, which does not exist at repo.amd.com/rocm/tarball/ (HEAD 403). Repinned to 7.9.0rc1, the newest pre-release TheRock tarball actually published for gfx1151 as of 2026-04-23. Revisit when AMD publishes a newer RC.

stable.description: AMD-official ROCm 7.12.0 TheRock tarball from repo.amd.com

preview.description: AMD-official ROCm 7.9.0rc1 TheRock pre-release tarball from repo.amd.com
